title: Xtra Molten American Dough Skillet
description: A mustardy, molten, one-pot American dish featuring Dutch stroop and long-fermentation-dough, perfect for a low-sodium friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the long-fermentation-dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent.
Stir in the Dutch stroop, Dijon mustard, and salt-free seasoning.
Arrange the cooked ground beef mixture in the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the shredded American cheese over the top of the beef mixture.
Pour the whole milk over the cheese.
Fold the edges of the dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Place the skillet in the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
